page_settings.meta_description: Solbion bridges the gap between physical hardware and AI orchestration. Explore our autonomous ecosystem through System Integration, Lab-as-a-Service, and the Data Consortium.

layout_structure.layout: Sticky, horizontal top-bar, transparent background transitioning to solid off-white on scroll
Two-column viewport height container. Left: Typography and primary actions. Right: Animated interactive vector graphic.

content.headline: Accelerating material discovery through collaborative automation.
content.subheadline: Solbion is a collaborative platform for automated materials discovery. We link experimental hardware with shared active learning loops to help research teams explore multi-dimensional search spaces together.

visual_element.description: Subtly pulsing, interactive Deep Teal active paths navigating a light Grey hexagonal lattice matrix background.

layout_structure.layout: Full-width section with a faint, low-opacity background grid. Typographic focus with high white space.

content.body_paragraph: Every breakthrough in clean energy, semiconductors, and catalysis depends on discovering the right materials. Traditional sequential trial-and-error is slow and isolates researchers. Solbion accelerates this process by introducing open active learning loops and automated feedback, transforming materials screening into a shared, digital roadmap.

layout_structure.layout: Horizontal row featuring three structurally identical geometric cards. Hover state highlights card border with Deep Teal.

cards.body: Bring autonomy to your own facility. We retrofit legacy and commoditized OEM thin-film deposition and spark ablation hardware with custom mechatronics, inline metrology, and our open-architecture Python orchestration layer.

Rent our centralized high-throughput discovery engine. Define your performance metrics—such as sub-5nm semiconductor layers or non-PGM catalysts—and let our active learning loops screen up to 500 alloy combinations a week.

Fuel your internal machine learning architectures with physical reality. Subscribe to a continuous, cleanly formatted stream of standardized metadata, mapping both highly optimized material recipes and valuable synthesis failures.

layout_structure.layout: Left column: Text explanation. Right column: Technical block diagram showing data and asset flows.

content.body_paragraph: We design discovery as a collaborative partnership, protecting your proprietary breakthroughs while enriching the open materials database. You own the specific material formulations; we share the optimization models that help you find them faster.

bullet_points.title: Your Foreground IP
bullet_points.description: The customer completely owns, patents, and controls the specific, optimized composition of matter discovered during their campaign.

bullet_points.title: Our Background Telemetry
bullet_points.description: Solbion retains anonymized machine metadata, failure logs, and baseline process curves to continuously update the core orchestration brain.

diagram_placeholder.description: Sankey or block flow diagram depicting client inputs leading to proprietary material IP while engineering metadata branches cleanly into the Solbion database cloud.

layout_structure.layout: Solid off-white block container floating centered inside a clean viewport. Clean, loud typography.

content.body: Bring speed and transparency to your materials development. Let's design custom automated setups, run high-throughput campaigns, or share standardized datasets to move clean science forward.

layout_structure.layout: Four-column footer with minimalist micro-copy, copyright details, and clean column links.
